meaning: n.[蛹ｻ]閾ｪ菴鍋ｧｻ讀咲黄,蜷檎ｧ咲ｧｻ讀咲黄
examples: Use the autograft to replace the aortic root and then attach a pulmonary homograft.
Objective To approach the protection of camera anterior bulbi to thyroid homograft.
To study the influence of the different preservative methods on homograft costal cartilage.
